creator: alepulver@FreeBSD.org
text:
- Update to version 20061228.
- Remove USE_X_PREFIX.
- Remove support for FreeBSD < 5.x.
- Remove old adjustements for the previous non-standard SDL location.
- Install documentation (when !NOPORTDOCS).
- Use %%DATADIR%% in pkg-plist.
- Update pkg-message (about upcoming games/alephone-data update and games/alephone-scenarios, which need this to be committed first so they all install under LOCALBASE).
